arts.ttl: Milan Closing in on Santiago Gimenez Signing
arts.sum: AC Milan are on the verge of securing a major transfer coup as they edge closer to signing Feyenoord's prolific striker Santiago Gimenez. The Rossoneri have made significant progress in negotiations over the past few hours, with growing optimism that the deal could be finalized imminently. The post Milan Closing in on Santiago Gimenez Signing appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.sum: Milan have reportedly increased their offer for striker Santiago Gimenez according to reports in Italy,...

Ajax has confirmed the signing of Go Ahead Eagles winger Oliver Edvardsen. Ajax have been keen to add a left winger to their squad this month and that need was enhanced by an injury suffered by Mika Godts. On Friday, Ajax have confirmed the signing of Oliver Edvardsen from Go Ahead Eagles on a deal […] The post Ajax sign Edvardsen appeared first on Football Oranje.

arts.ttl: Jordan Henderson now expected to STAY at Ajax until the end of season - as ill-feeling towards former Liverpool captain reaches peak in Netherlands
arts.sum: Jordan Henderson is expected to stay at Ajax until the end of the season, unless Monaco come back with an extraordinary bid for the midfielder this month.

arts.ttl: Brighton defender Tariq Lamptey set to join Ajax with forward Chuba Akpom poised to leave the Dutch club for Lille
arts.sum: JOE BERNSTEIN: The Dutch giants are ready to pay a cut price £1.5million for 24-year-old Lamptey with the pacey full-back out of contract this summer.

arts.ttl: Santiago Gimenez: Barcelona push Rashford aside to focus on Mexico star
arts.sum: Although the Mexico international is thought to be close to a move to AC Milan, Barcelona are looking at other options in attack as Robert Lewandowski’s heir, Vitor Roque, has failed to fire since arriving in Spain a year ago. Feyenoord want €50 million for Gimenez, which is a price that is described as being “considerable but feasible” for Barcelona.

arts.ttl: Preview: Ajax vs. Feyenoord - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's Eredivisie clash between Ajax and Feyenoord, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Feyenoord coach refuses to rule out Gimenez Milan transfer
arts.sum: Feyenoord coach Brian Priske refuses to rule out Santiago Gimenez’s Milan transfer, saying he understands...

arts.ttl: Feyenoord Manager Priske on Gimenez: “I’d Like to Keep Him, But He Dreams of Milan”
arts.sum: Feyenoord head coach Brian Priske has addressed the potential transfer of star striker Santiago Gimenez to AC Milan, who coincidentally could be their opponents in the upcoming Champions League playoff round. Speaking after the draw in Nyon, Priske acknowledged the delicate situation surrounding the Mexican forward. The post Feyenoord Manager Priske on Gimenez: “I’d Like to Keep Him, But He Dreams of Milan” appeared first on FootItalia.com.
